scripts.demo:http: concurrently "node x402/facilitator.js" "node x402/server.js" "npm run dev --prefix demo/http"
scripts.demo:mcp: npm run build --prefix demo/mcp && concurrently "node x402/facilitator.js" "node x402/server.js" "node demo/mcp/dashboard.js"
scripts.demo:mcp-inprocess: npm run build --prefix demo/mcp && concurrently "node x402/server-inprocess.js" "node demo/mcp/dashboard.js"
